revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Definition needed]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 331 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.

revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]</noinclude>
#redirect[[:en:Template:Definition needed]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects D
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Definition needed]] <noinclude></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Definition needed}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Please clarify | text = definition needed | title = {{{1|{{{title|{{{reason|This term needs to be defined.}}} }}} }}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification }}<!--{{Definition needed end}}--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Definition needed}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Please clarify | text = definition needed | title = {{{1|{{{title|{{{reason|This term needs to be defined.}}} }}} }}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification }}<!--{{Definition needed end}}--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Definition_needed here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Definition_needed for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Definition needed}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Please clarify | text = definition needed | title = {{{1|{{{title|{{{reason|This term needs to be defined.}}} }}} }}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification }}<!--{{Definition needed end}}--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Definition_needed for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Fix
| subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly>
| link  = Wikipedia:Please clarify
| text  = definition needed
| title = {{{1|{{{title|{{{reason|This term needs to be defined.}}} }}} }}}
| date  = {{{date|}}}
| cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing clarification
}}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
